content.text: After IYC14, I would implement a program that combines both online and physical engagement to raise awareness among the general public about current global challenges. This program would focus on educating communities on how to respond effectively and build resilient systems to address issues such as global warming and environmental degradation.

After IYC14, I would implement a program that combines online and in-person engagement to raise public awareness about current global challenges. The program would focus on educating communities about effective responses to issues such as global warming and environmental degradation, while also helping them build more resilient and sustainable systems.

Through digital campaigns, workshops, community discussions, and practical action projects, the program would encourage people to understand the causes and impacts of these challenges and take meaningful steps in their daily lives. It would also promote collaboration among youth, local leaders, educators, and environmental organizations to create long-term solutions that strengthen community resilience and protect the environment.

Secondly, as someone with a background in ICT and software development, I would design and develop digital solutions that directly support communities. This would include creating early warning or early detection systems to help address emerging challenges more efficiently. In the long term, I would also develop a mobile application that enables youths and communities to form and manage village savings groups (village banks), helping to reduce poverty and promote financial inclusion at the grassroots level.`
